changeSet.author: kanix
changeSet.comment: Add github_user_id column to customer table for GitHub OAuth linking (FR-068)
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE customer ADD COLUMN github_user_id text; CREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_customer_github_user_id ON customer (github_user_id) WHERE github_user_id IS NOT NULL;
changeSet.rollback: DROP INDEX IF EXISTS uq_customer_github_user_id; ALTER TABLE customer DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS github_user_id;
